from 'next/server'\r import * as cheerio from 'cheerio'\r \r export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\r try {\r // \u83B7\u53D6\u67E5\u8BE2\u53C2\u6570\r const searchParams = request.nextUrl.searchParams\r const tag = searchParams.get('tag') || ''\r const page = parseInt(searchParams.get('page') || '1')\r \r // \u6784\u5EFA\u6398\u91D1 API URL\r const url = \`https://juejin.cn/tag/\${encodeURIComponent(tag)}\`\r \r // \u53D1\u9001\u8BF7\u6C42\u83B7\u53D6\u9875\u9762\u5185\u5BB9\r const response = await fetch(url, {\r headers: {\r 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36'\r }\r })\r \r const html = await response.text()\r \r // \u4F7F\u7528 cheerio \u89E3\u6790 HTML\r const $ = cheerio.load(html)\r \r // \u63D0\u53D6\u6587\u7AE0\u4FE1\u606F\r const articles = []\r $('.article-item').each((i, element) => {\r const title = $(element).find('.title').text().trim()\r const link = $(element).find('.title a').attr('href')\r const author = $(element).find('.author').text().trim()\r const description = $(element).find('.description').text().trim()\r \r articles.push({\r title,\r link: \`https://juejin.cn\${link}\`,\r author,\r description\r })\r })\r \r return NextResponse.json({\r articles,\r page,\r tag\r })\r } catch (error) {\r console.error('\u722C\u53D6\u6398\u91D1\u6587\u7AE0\u5931\u8D25:', error)\r return NextResponse.json(\r { error: '\u722C\u53D6\u6587\u7AE0\u5931\u8D25' },\r { `,(0,r.jsxDEV)(n.pre,{children:(0,r.jsxDEV)(n.code,{className:"language-typescript",children:`// src/hooks/useArticles.ts\r import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\r \r export function useArticles(tag: string) {\r const [articles, setArticles] = useState([])\r const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)\r const [error, setError] = useState(null)\r \r const fetchArticles = async (page = 1) => {\r setIsLoading(true)\r setError(null)\r \r try {\r const response = await fetch(\r \`/api/juejin?tag=\${encodeURIComponent(tag)}&page=\${page}\`\r )\r const data = await response.json()\r \r if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error)\r \r setArticles(data.articles)\r } catch (err) {\r setError(err.message)\r } finally {\r setIsLoading(false)\r }\r }\r \r useEffect(() => {\r if (tag) {\r fetchArticles()\r }\r }, [tag])\r \r return { articles, isLoading, error, fetchArticles }\r } `},void
